message:
fix(update): prevent claiming blocked issues (#38)

Add blocking check when transitioning to in_progress status via
--claim or --status in_progress. This makes the behavior consistent
with br close, which already checks for blockers.

Changes:
- Add blocking validation in execute() when status becomes in_progress
- Add --force flag to allow bypassing the blocking check when needed
- Error message shows the blocking dependencies

Fixes #38

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1066,6 +1066,10 @@ pub struct UpdateArgs {
     #[arg(long)]
     pub claim: bool,
 
+    /// Force update even if issue is blocked
+    #[arg(long)]
+    pub force: bool,
+
     /// Set due date (empty string clears)
     #[arg(long)]
     pub due: Option<String>,
